{0x0102,0x0000}[0x000A]學會了{0x0107,0x0001}！{0xBE05,0x0004}{0xBE05,0x0001}
１{0xBE02:0x0014}、２{0xBE02:0x0014}…{0xBE02:0x0014}…{0xBE02:0x0014}空！{0xBE05,0x0003}{0xBE05,0x0000}{0xBE01}[0x000A]{0x0102,0x0000}把{0x0107,0x0001}的[0x000A]使用方法忘得一乾二淨了！{0xBE01}[0x000A]於是……！{0xBE01}[0x000A]{0x0102,0x0000}學會了[0x000A]{0x0107,0x0002}！{0xBE05,0x0004}{0xBE05,0x0001}
